## Benchmark Information

### Task/Dataset Name

Name of the OCR task or dataset (e.g., "Scene Text Recognition", "Document OCR", "ICDAR 2015")

### Specific Dataset

If applicable, specify the exact dataset variant or subset.

## Model/Method Details

### Model Name

Name of the model or method used.

### Paper Title

Full title of the research paper (if applicable).

### Authors

List of authors.

### Publication Venue

Where was this published? (e.g., CVPR 2024, arXiv, NeurIPS 2023)

### Publication Date

When was this work published or made available?

- arXiv:
- Conference/Journal:
- GitHub:
- Project Page:
- Other:
